pi_items.verified_value: KSFO - San Francisco International Airport (ICAO code)
pi_items.source: AirNav (airnav.com), Wikipedia, and multiple aviation authorities confirm KSFO is the ICAO code for San Francisco International Airport

pi_items.verified_value: KLAX - Los Angeles International Airport (ICAO code)
pi_items.source: AirNav (airnav.com), Wikipedia, and multiple aviation authorities confirm KLAX is the ICAO code for Los Angeles International Airport

privileged_info_summary: The flight plan task uses two real FAA airport identifiers: KSFO (San Francisco International Airport, IATA: SFO) and KLAX (Los Angeles International Airport, IATA: LAX). Both are major U.S. commercial airports and are standard references in the Avare aviation GPS database.
